title: UK passengers face possible flight cuts as government changes airline rules over jet fuel supply fears
summary_full: The UK government is temporarily relaxing airport slot rules to help airlines manage potential summer travel disruption caused by global jet fuel market pressures. This move aims to prevent sudden cancellations and "ghost flights" by allowing airlines to adjust schedules in advance, ensuring greater passenger confidence and realistic planning.
